build.buildCommand: if [ -f backend/requirements.txt ]; then python -m pip install -r backend/requirements.txt; else python -m pip install -r requirements.txt; fi; cd frontend; npm ci; npm run build; cd ..

deploy.startCommand: if [ -d backend ]; then cd backend; fi; python -m uvicorn app.main:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port $PORT
